parameters.text:
=You just received a message or payment decision from Payment Decision Agent.

Respond based on what actually happened:
- If a valid payment was received (amount > 0 and amount < 1000001), thank Agent A and mention the amount and reason if available.
- If the payment was rejected or invalid (amount < 1 or amount > 1000001 or pay: false), politely explain that the payment was not accepted and why. Use the rejection_reason if it is provided.

Keep your response natural, concise, and professional.

parameters.subject: Agent Bitcoin Payment Report
parameters.html:
=

Lightning Payment Report

Date: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

Time: {{ $now.format('HH:mm:ss') }}

From: {{ $node["Merge"].json.from || $json.from || $node["Webhook"].json.body.from || "Unknown Agent" }}

To: Agent-B

Status: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.status === 'rejected' ? '❌ Rejected' : '✅ Success' }}

Original Amount: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.original_amount || $node["Merge"].json.payment_amount || 0 }} sats

Fee (Intermediary): {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.fee_sats || 0 }} sats

Net Amount to Recipient: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.net_amount_to_payee || $node["Get Final State"].json.payment_amount || 0 }} sats

Payment Hash: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.payment_hash }}

Reason: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.reason }}

{{ $node["Get Final State"].json.status === 'rejected' ? '

Rejection Message: ' + ($node["Get Final State"].json.rejection_reason || $node["Get Final State"].json.agent_b_message || 'Payment was rejected or blocked by guardrail') + '

' : '' }}

nodes.name: Did Payment Succeed
nodes.notes: Check whether Lightning payment was successful or not.

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "payment_amount": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.payment_amount || 0 }}",
  "payment_fee": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.payment_fee || 0 }}",
  "payment_hash": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.payment_hash || 'N/A' }}",
  "reason": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.reason || 'No reason provided' }}",
  "status": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.status || 'rejected' }}",
  "agent_b_message": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.agent_b_message || 'Payment was rejected or blocked by guardrail' }}",
  "rejection_reason": "{{ $node["Merge"].json.rejection_reason || 'N/A' }}",

  "original_amount": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.original_amount }}",
  "fee_sats": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.fee_sats }}",
  "net_amount_to_payee": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.net_amount_to_payee }}",
  "fee_reason": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.fee_reason }}"
}

{
  "pay": false,
  "amount": "{{ Number($json.amount || 0) }}",
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason || 'No reason given' }}",
  "message": "Payment amount {{ Number($json.amount || 0) }} sats is outside allowed range (1 to 1,000,000 sats)",
  "status": "rejected",
  "rejection_reason": "Amount is outside allowed range (1 to 1,000,000 sats)"
}

nodes.name: Check Payment Decision
nodes.notes: Checks if Agent-X wants to proceed with a payment to Agent-B.

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "success": true,
  "payment_amount": "{{ $json.amount || $node["Pay Invoice Payment Decision Agent"]?.json?.payment_route?.total_amt || $node["Pay Invoice Payment Decision Agent"]?.json?.amt_to_forward || 0 }}",
  "payment_fee": "{{ $json.fee || 0 }}",
  "payment_hash": "{{ $json.payment_hash || $json.payment_route?.payment_hash || $node["Pay Invoice Payment Decision Agent"]?.json?.payment_hash || $node["Pay Invoice Payment Decision Agent"]?.json?.payment_route?.payment_hash || 'N/A' }}",
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason || $node["Payment Accepted 1"]?.json.reason || 'Payment to Agent-B executed' }}",
  "status": "success",
  "pay": true,
  "agent_b_message": "Payment completed successfully",
  "rejection_reason": "N/A",
  
  "original_amount": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.original_amount }}",
  "fee_sats": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.fee_sats }}",
  "net_amount_to_payee": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.net_amount_to_payee }}",
  "fee_reason": "={{ $node["Calculate Fixed Fee"].json.fee_reason }}"
}

={
  "success": false,
  "payment_amount": 0,
  "payment_fee": 0,
  "payment_hash": "N/A",
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason || $json.payment_error || 'Payment rejected by guardrail' }}",
  "status": "rejected",
  "pay": false,
  "agent_b_message": "Payment was rejected or blocked by guardrail",
  "rejection_reason": "{{ 
    $json.payment_error === 'insufficient_balance' 
      ? 'Agent-X does not have enough Lightning balance to send this payment' 
      : $json.payment_error === 'no_route' 
        ? 'No route found to Agent B'
        : $json.payment_error || 
          $json.rejection_reason || 
          $json.reason || 
          'Unknown reason' 
  }}"
}

options.systemMessage:
You are Payment Decision Agent, a secure financial gatekeeper.

STRICT RULES:
- Respond with valid JSON only. No extra text.
- Use this exact format:

{
  "pay": true or false,
  "amount": integer in sats,
  "reason": "short meaningful explanation"
}

- Approve the payment unless there is a clear violation (amount < 1, amount > 1000000, suspicious request, etc.)
- Always provide a short, clear reason.

nodes.name: Pay Invoice Payment Decision Agent
nodes.notes:
Send Lightning payment from Payment Decision Agent to Agent B.

Use Agent-X macaroon.

parameters.command: =docker exec agent-b-lnd lncli --network=regtest --macaroonpath=/root/.lnd/data/chain/bitcoin/regtest/admin.macaroon addinvoice --memo="{{ $json.reason || 'Payment from Agent-X' }}" --amt={{ $json.net_amount_to_payee }}
